subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Ahd va Mithaq (Last Tablet to America)
subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! Abdu'l-Baha is day and night thinking of you and mentioning... Consider! The Divine Gardener cuts off the dry or weak branch
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی عبدالبهاء شب و روز بیاد شما و بذکر شما مشغول زیرا یاران الهی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly
